chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 904 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.24 & 25. 2. For hearing of main case. 23.09.2025 Syed Shohrat Hussain Rizvi, advocate for the applicant. On the last date, following order was passed: “27.11.2023 Mr. S. Shohrat Hussain Rizvi, Advocate for Applicant. 1. To be complied with before the next date. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Counsel for the Applicant while confronted needs time to place on record copy of Show Cause Notice issued to the Respondent. Time allowed. Adjourned.” Today counsel is present, admits non-compliance of the order and remains unable to assist. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter pending since 2023, in which even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
